hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */dist/*|*/node_modules/*|yarn.lock|*.lock) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit generated/lock file'; exit 1;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */dist/*|*/node_modules/*|yarn.lock|*.lock) echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit generated/lock file'; exit 1;; esac

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.ts|*.vue|*.js|*.tsx|*.jsx) prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; eslint --fix --cache "$filepath" 2>/dev/null;; *.css|*.json|*.md|*.html) prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null;; esac

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.ts|*.vue|*.js|*.tsx|*.jsx) prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; eslint --fix --cache "$filepath" 2>/dev/null;; *.css|*.json|*.md|*.html) prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */framework/*.ts|*/framework/*.vue) cd framework && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -40;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */framework/*.ts|*/framework/*.vue) cd framework && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -40;; esac

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */framework/*.vue|*/framework/*.ts) case "$f" in *.docs.md|*.stories.ts) ;; *) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[docs-keeper] You just modified a framework source file. Check if the corresponding *.docs.md and/or *.stories.ts need to be updated. Use the docs-keeper skill if needed."}}' ;; esac ;; esac; }
